sections.concept: Interest is calculated only on principal amount.

sections.solvingTechnique: Use Successive Percentage change formula or Pascal Triangle ratios (2:1 for 2 yrs, 3:3:1 for 3 yrs).

shortcuts: Diff between CI and SI for 2 yrs = P(R/100)^2.
commonMistakes: Calculating CI directly from formula (Formula gives Amount, not Interest). Subtract P!
Mixing half-yearly and quarterly rates. (For half-yearly: Rate/2, Time*2).
placementTips: Learn squares up to 30 for CI calculations.
Difference between SI and CI questions are frequent.
